query: UPDATE stage_instance SET status = CASE WHEN status IN ('done', 'failed') THEN status ELSE ? END, parked_reason = CASE WHEN status IN ('done', 'failed') THEN parked_reason ELSE ? END, started_at = COALESCE(CAST(? AS TEXT), started_at), ended_at = CASE WHEN status IN ('done', 'failed') THEN ended_at ELSE ? END, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?
